title: CFTRI Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CFTRI) has declared the official notification for the various recruitment of Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the CFTRI Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts.
